column.name: description
column.value: Percentage of patients with diabetes who have HbA1c less than 8%

column.name: description
column.value: Percentage of patients with hypertension who have BP less than 140/90

column.name: description
column.value: Percentage of patients adhering to prescribed medications

column.name: subject
column.value: You have an upcoming care requirement

column.name: body
column.value: Dear {{patientName}}, you have a care gap for {{measureName}} that needs attention. Please contact your healthcare provider or clinic to address this gap.

column.name: body
column.value: Reminder: You have an appointment on {{date}} at {{time}}. Reply CONFIRM to confirm or CANCEL to cancel.

column.name: body
column.value: Your recent health assessment score is {{score}}. {{recommendations}}

column.name: body
column.value: Dear {{patientName}}, your lab results for {{testName}} are now available. {{actionRequired}}

column.name: body
column.value: Time to take your {{medicationName}}. If you have any questions, contact your pharmacy.

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Insert additional notification template for in-app notifications

column.name: body
column.value: Alert: {{alertMessage}}. Please review your health information and take appropriate action.

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create trigger to automatically update patient updated_at timestamp
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_update_patient_timestamp ON patient.patients; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS patient.update_patient_timestamp();

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create function to insert default notification preferences for new patients
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_create_default_preferences ON patient.patients; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS notification.create_default_preferences();

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create function to automatically log data changes to audit log
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION audit.audit_data_changes() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF TG_OP = 'INSERT' THEN INSERT INTO audit.data_change_log (table_name, record_id, column_name, new_value, changed_by, tenant_id) SELECT TG_TABLE_NAME, NEW.id::text, key, value, 'SYSTEM', CASE WHEN NEW.tenant_id IS NOT NULL THEN NEW.tenant_id ELSE 'DEFAULT' END FROM jsonb_each_text(row_to_json(NEW)::jsonb) WHERE key NOT IN ('id', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'version'); ELSIF TG_OP = 'UPDATE' THEN INSERT INTO audit.data_change_log (table_name, record_id, column_name, old_value, new_value, changed_by, tenant_id) SELECT TG_TABLE_NAME, NEW.id::text, key, row_to_json(OLD)::jsonb->>key, row_to_json(NEW)::jsonb->>key, 'SYSTEM', CASE WHEN NEW.tenant_id IS NOT NULL THEN NEW.tenant_id ELSE 'DEFAULT' END FROM jsonb_object_keys(row_to_json(NEW)::jsonb) AS key WHERE row_to_json(OLD)::jsonb->>key IS DISTINCT FROM row_to_json(NEW)::jsonb->>key; END IF; RETURN NULL; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
